title: Notifications - Low Battery
scenario: Low battery notification appears when paired device with <5% battery is power cycled while app is in background, and tapping notification redirects to Poly Lens home screen
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app and pair a Bluetooth audio device.
2. Ensure the paired device's battery level is below 5%.
3. Send the Poly Studio Mobile app to the background (e.g., press the Home button).
4. Turn off the paired Bluetooth device (e.g., press and hold the Power button).
5. Wait a few seconds, then turn the paired device back on (e.g., press and hold the Power button).
6. Observe the notification area on the mobile device.
7. Tap the "Device has a low battery" notification.
expected: A "Device has a low battery" notification appears. Tapping the notification redirects the user to the Poly Lens application home screen.
